meaning: 提华纳[墨西哥西北部城市]
examples: Then, in January, 2010, El Teo was captured-not in Tijuana but in La Paz, in Baja California Sur, nine hundred miles away.
In the drug wars that rack mexico-the death toll over the past four years is approaching thirty thousand-tijuana is an anomaly.
The weakening of local traffickers in Tijuana and Ciudad Juárez has enabled Sinaloa to strengthen its presence along Mexico’s northern border.
Bostich says thats kept Americans away from Tijuana, including musicians he used to collaborate with.
The music scene of Tijuana once teemed with nightclubs and thousands of American revelers.
